Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import os

def make_icon\(size\):
    img = Image.new\('RGB', \(size, size\), '#1e40af'\)
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)
    # Draw a simple 'F' letter
    margin = size // 5
    lw = max\(2, size // 20\)
    # Vertical bar
    draw.rectangle\([margin, margin, margin + lw*2, size - margin], fill='white'\)
    # Top horizontal
    draw.rectangle\([margin, margin, size - margin, margin + lw*2], fill='white'\)
    # Middle horizontal
    mid = size // 2
    draw.rectangle\([margin, mid - lw, margin + \(size - 2*margin\) * 2 // 3, mid + lw], fill='white'\)
    img.save\(f'app/static/icon-{size}.png'\)
    print\(f'Created icon-{size}.png'\)

os.makedirs\('app/static', exist_ok=True\)
make_icon\(192\)
make_icon\(512\)
" && echo "Icons created")

Bash(python3 -c "
import struct, zlib, os

def png_chunk\(chunk_type, data\):
    c = chunk_type + data
    return struct.pack\('>I', len\(data\)\) + c + struct.pack\('>I', zlib.crc32\(c\) & 0xffffffff\)

def make_png\(size, r, g, b\):
    # Simple solid color PNG
    raw = b''
    for y in range\(size\):
        row = b'\\x00'  # filter type none
        for x in range\(size\):
            row += bytes\([r, g, b]\)
        raw += row
    compressed = zlib.compress\(raw, 9\)
    
    sig = b'\\x89PNG\\r\\n\\x1a\\n'
    ihdr = png_chunk\(b'IHDR', struct.pack\('>IIBBBBB', size, size, 8, 2, 0, 0, 0\)\)
    idat = png_chunk\(b'IDAT', compressed\)
    iend = png_chunk\(b'IEND', b''\)
    return sig + ihdr + idat + iend

# Blue icon color: #1e40af = 30, 64, 175
for size in [192, 512]:
    data = make_png\(size, 30, 64, 175\)
    with open\(f'app/static/icon-{size}.png', 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(data\)
    print\(f'icon-{size}.png created \({len\(data\)} bytes\)'\)
" && echo "OK")

Bash(python3 -c "
import ast, sys

files = [
    'app/config.py', 'app/database.py', 'app/main.py',
    'app/models/contact.py', 'app/models/invoice.py', 'app/models/expense.py',
    'app/routers/auth.py', 'app/routers/utils.py', 'app/routers/dashboard.py',
    'app/routers/invoices.py', 'app/routers/expenses.py',
    'app/routers/contacts.py', 'app/routers/exports.py',
    'app/services/ares.py', 'app/services/qr_code.py',
    'app/services/pdf_generator.py', 'app/services/xml_generator.py',
]
errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fp:
            ast.parse\(fp.read\(\)\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        errors.append\(f'{f}: {e}'\)

if errors:
    for e in errors:
        print\('SYNTAX ERROR:', e\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
else:
    print\('Všechny Python soubory OK \(syntaxe\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from passlib.hash import bcrypt
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

# Nastavit test heslo
import os
os.environ['PASSWORD_HASH'] = bcrypt.hash\('testpass123'\)
os.environ['SECRET_KEY'] = 'test-secret-key-for-testing'

client = TestClient\(app, follow_redirects=False\)

# Test 1: Login stránka přístupná
resp = client.get\('/prihlaseni'\)
print\('Login GET:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 200 else 'FAIL'\)

# Test 2: Root redirect na login \(bez session\)
resp = client.get\('/'\)
print\('Root redirect:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 302 else 'FAIL'\)

# Test 3: Login s nesprávným heslem
resp = client.post\('/prihlaseni', data={'password': 'wrongpass'}\)
print\('Wrong password:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 401 else 'FAIL'\)

print\('Základní testy prošly!'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import bcrypt as _bcrypt
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

# Vygenerovat test hash
pw = b'testpass123'
hashed = _bcrypt.hashpw\(pw, _bcrypt.gensalt\(\)\).decode\(\)
print\('Hash:', hashed[:20], '...'\)

import os
os.environ['PASSWORD_HASH'] = hashed
os.environ['SECRET_KEY'] = 'test-secret-key'

from app.main import app
client = TestClient\(app, follow_redirects=False\)

# Test 1: Login stránka
resp = client.get\('/prihlaseni'\)
print\('Login GET:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 200 else 'FAIL'\)

# Test 2: Root redirect
resp = client.get\('/'\)
print\('Root redirect:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 302 else 'FAIL'\)

# Test 3: Wrong password
resp = client.post\('/prihlaseni', data={'password': 'wrong'}\)
print\('Wrong password:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 401 else 'FAIL'\)

# Test 4: Correct password
resp = client.post\('/prihlaseni', data={'password': 'testpass123'}\)
print\('Correct login:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 302 else 'FAIL'\)

print\('Vsechny testy OK!'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import bcrypt as _bcrypt, os
os.environ['PASSWORD_HASH'] = _bcrypt.hashpw\(b'testpass123', _bcrypt.gensalt\(\)\).decode\(\)
os.environ['SECRET_KEY'] = 'test-secret-key-32chars-minimum!'

# Nutno zrušit LRU cache pro config před importem
import importlib
import app.config
importlib.reload\(app.config\)
app.config.get_settings.cache_clear\(\)

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

client = TestClient\(app, follow_redirects=False\)

# Test 1: Login stránka
resp = client.get\('/prihlaseni'\)
print\('Login GET:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 200 else 'FAIL'\)

# Test 2: Root redirect \(bez session\)
resp = client.get\('/'\)
print\('Root redirect:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 302 else 'FAIL'\)
print\('  Location:', resp.headers.get\('location', ''\)\)

# Test 3: Wrong password
resp = client.post\('/prihlaseni', data={'password': 'wrong'}\)
print\('Wrong password:', resp.status_code, 'OK' if resp.status_code == 401 else 'FAIL'\)

print\('Testy OK!'\)
" 2>&1)
